name: Boothbay Harbor Town Pickleball Court
description: Come play pickleball at Boothbay Harbor Town Pickleball Court in Boothbay Harbor, ME! There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The court is private.

name: Boothbay Region YMCA
description: Boothbay Region YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Boothbay Harbor, ME. There are 8 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Free for members, $10 drop in for non-members

name: Central Lincoln County YMCA
description: Central Lincoln County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Damariscotta, ME. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Ice Pond HOA
description: Come play pickleball at Ice Pond HOA in Waldoboro, ME! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Jefferson Maine
description: Come play pickleball at Jefferson Maine in Jefferson, ME! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Townsend-Emery Temporary Courts
description: Townsend-Emery Temporary Courts is a place to play pickleball in Boothbay Harbor, ME. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Waldoboro Rec - Waldoboro First Baptist Church
description: Waldoboro Rec - Waldoboro First Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Waldoboro, ME. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Wiscasset Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Wiscasset Community Center in Wiscasset, ME! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
